title: Checkout with Loyalty Card
scene: 你在超市收银台结账。

turns.en: Do you have a loyalty card?
Yes. Phone number five five five, zero one two three.

turns.cn: 一共四十八块五，要袋子吗？
turns.en: Forty-eight fifty total. Need bags?
I brought my own. I'll pay by card.
Insert or tap your card.
Do I need to sign?
No signature. Receipt's in the bag.

title: Self-Checkout Problem
scene: 自助收银机扫不了条码，你叫店员帮忙。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这个罐头扫不出来。
turns.en: Excuse me, this can won't scan.

turns.cn: 条码磨花了，我帮您手动输入。
turns.en: The barcode's worn. I'll key it in.

turns.cn: 称重的那袋苹果也卡住了。
turns.en: The bag of apples on the scale is stuck too.

turns.cn: 请拿开重新放，绿灯亮了再扫别的。
turns.en: Remove it and place it again. Wait for the green light before scanning more.
It's working now. Thanks.
Call me if anything else comes up.

title: Asking for Aisle
scene: 你在超市里找不到酱油，问员工。

turns.en: Excuse me, which aisle is soy sauce in?

turns.cn: 亚洲食品在七道，或者国际食品区。
turns.en: Asian foods in aisle seven, or the international section.
Do you carry low-sodium?

turns.cn: 七道中间货架，品牌不多。
turns.en: Middle shelf in seven. Not many brands.
Where's the milk?
Back wall coolers, far left.
Thank you!

title: Weighing Produce
scene: 你买散装葡萄，在秤上称重打价签。

turns.cn: 自助秤怎么用？第一次用。
turns.en: How does the scale work? First time.

turns.cn: 选水果代码，放上去，打印贴纸贴袋上。
turns.en: Pick the produce code, place it on the scale, print the sticker for the bag.
What's the code for grapes?
Search grape on the screen. Four zero eight one.
I scan this at checkout?
Yes. Stick it on before you check out.
Got it. Thanks.

title: Asian Market Fish Counter
scene: 你在华人超市鱼档买清蒸鲈鱼。

turns.en: Which fish? Sea bass is fresh today.

turns.cn: 一条鲈鱼，帮忙去鳞去内脏，不切。
turns.en: One sea bass, scaled and gutted, whole please.
Clean only? Steaming?
Yes, for steaming. Leave the head on.

turns.cn: 一斤八块九，这条大概一斤半。
turns.en: Eight ninety a pound. This one's about a pound and a half.
Okay. A bunch of scallions too.
Scallions are up front in produce.

title: Return Without Receipt
scene: 你买的酸奶坏了，没有小票要退货。

turns.en: Customer service. What's the issue?
This yogurt was expired. I lost the receipt.

turns.cn: 会员卡查得到购买记录吗？
turns.en: Can we look it up on your loyalty card?
Yes. Phone five five five, zero one two three.
Found it. Exchange or refund?
Refund, please. Thank you.
It'll go back to your original card.

title: Price Match
scene: 竞品超市同款更便宜，你要求 price match。

turns.cn: 这款麦片隔壁店卖三块九，你们能 match 吗？
turns.en: This cereal is three ninety at the other store. Can you price match?

turns.cn: 请出示广告或手机页面。
turns.en: Please show the ad or the page on your phone.
Here. Valid today.

turns.cn: 可以，我改价，同款限一包。
turns.en: Sure. I'll override it. One item per product.
Okay. Just this one.
New price three ninety.

title: Gluten-Free Section
scene: 你对麸质过敏，问员工无麸质面包在哪。

turns.en: Where's the gluten-free bread?

turns.cn: 十二道冷冻柜，绿色标签。
turns.en: Freezer aisle twelve. Green labels.
Is it separate from regular bread?
Yes, to avoid cross-contamination.
Do you have gluten-free soy sauce?
Aisle seven Asian section. Small tamari bottles.
Thanks.

title: Bag Fee
scene: 加州超市袋子收费，你跟收银员确认。

turns.cn: 需要袋子吗？每个十美分。
turns.en: Need bags? Ten cents each.

turns.cn: 要两个纸袋，我自己没带。
turns.en: Two paper bags, please. I forgot mine.
Twenty cents added to your total.
I'll bring reusable bags next time.
Put heavy items on the bottom.
Thank you.

title: Split Payment
scene: 你想一部分用食品券一部分刷卡。

turns.cn: 能分开付吗？三十块用EBT，其余刷卡。
turns.en: Can I split payment? Thirty on EBT, the rest on my card.
Sure. Swipe EBT first.

turns.cn: EBT不能买这瓶维生素对吧？
turns.en: EBT doesn't cover these vitamins, right?

turns.cn: 对，维生素我单独扫，走信用卡。
turns.en: Correct. I'll ring vitamins separately on your card.
Okay.
EBT is five short. Please cover the difference.
Put the rest on my card.

title: Deli Counter
scene: 你在熟食柜台买切片火鸡。

turns.en: Next. What can I get you?

turns.cn: 半磅低钠火鸡，切薄一点。
turns.en: Half a pound of low-sodium turkey, sliced thin.
Any cheese?

turns.cn: 再来四分之一磅瑞士奶酪。
turns.en: A quarter pound of Swiss too.
Seven twenty total.
Sticker price tag and I'll pay at checkout.
Here you go.

title: In-Store Pharmacy Pickup
scene: 你在超市内药房窗口取处方药。

turns.en: Pickup or consultation?
Pickup. Zhang, March twelfth nineteen ninety.

turns.cn: 抗生素，饭后吃，每天两次。
turns.en: Antibiotic. Take with food, twice daily.
Can I drink alcohol?
Avoid alcohol during the course.
Ten-dollar copay, right?
Yes. Please swipe.

title: Rain Check
scene: 促销鸡蛋卖光了，你要 rain check。

turns.cn: 广告上鸡蛋一块九，货架空了，能开 rain check 吗？
turns.en: Eggs are a dollar ninety in the ad but sold out. Can I get a rain check?

turns.cn: 可以，补货后两周内同价买两盒。
turns.en: Yes. Same price for two cartons within two weeks of restock.
Any idea when they'll be back?
Usually tomorrow morning.
Okay. Thank you.
Keep this slip and show it at checkout.

title: Load Groceries to Car
scene: 你买了很多东西，问店员能否帮忙推到车位。

turns.cn: 能帮我推到停车场吗？东西有点多。
turns.en: Could you help me to the parking lot? It's a lot to carry.
Sure. Where's your car?
Blue SUV, third row.

turns.cn: 冷冻品放最后，我先装干货。
turns.en: I'll load dry goods first, frozen items last.
Thanks. Here's a tip.
Much appreciated!

title: Coupon Not Working
scene: 结账时优惠券扫不进去。

turns.cn: 这张两美元优惠券怎么没用上？
turns.en: Why didn't this two-dollar coupon apply?

turns.cn: 要买指定品牌大包装才行。
turns.en: It requires the large size of the named brand.

turns.cn: 我换大瓶可以吗？还差什么？
turns.en: Can I swap for the large bottle? What else?
Large size is fine. I'll rescan.
Two dollars off now?
Yes. Total forty-six.
Great. Card please.

title: PA Announcement Unclear
scene: 超市广播通知，你没听清，问员工。

turns.cn: 刚才广播说什么？要清场吗？
turns.en: What did the announcement say? Are we closing?

turns.cn: 只是冷藏区降价，不是关店。
turns.en: Just a markdown in dairy, not closing.
Thanks. You scared me for a second.

turns.cn: 没事，听不清可以问我们。
turns.en: No worries. Ask us if you can't hear.
Okay.

title: Deli Number Called
scene: 熟食柜台叫号，你没听清是不是你的。

turns.en: Number forty-seven! Forty-seven!

turns.cn: 我是四十七吗？刚才没听清。
turns.en: Is that me? I have forty-seven but I didn't catch it.
Yes. Here's your turkey.
Thanks. Sorry I'm late.
No problem. Watch the screen next time.
Will do.

title: Unit Price Question
scene: 两种规格牛奶，你问哪个更便宜。

turns.cn: 你看标签上每盎司价格，大瓶划算吗？
turns.en: Look at the per-ounce price on the tag. Is the big bottle cheaper?

turns.cn: 大瓶每盎司便宜三美分。
turns.en: The big one is three cents cheaper per ounce.
But I might not finish it before it expires.
Then get the small one. Don't waste it.
Good point. Thanks.

title: Lane Closed Redirect
scene: 你排的收银通道突然关闭，店员指示换队。

turns.en: This lane is closed. Please use lane three.
Where's lane three? I didn't catch that.
Straight ahead on your left. Green light.
Okay. Thanks.
Sure.

title: Senior Discount
scene: 你帮父母结账，问是否有老人折扣。

turns.en: Is there a senior discount on Tuesdays?

turns.cn: 六十五岁以上百分之五，要ID。
turns.en: Five percent for sixty-five plus with ID.
Will a passport work?
Yes. Let me check the birth date.
Thank you.
Discount applied. Go ahead and pay.

title: Gift Card Balance
scene: 你在收银台查礼品卡余额。

turns.cn: 能查这张礼品卡还剩多少吗？
turns.en: Can you check the balance on this gift card?
Swipe… twelve thirty left.

turns.cn: 不够的话能刷卡补差吗？
turns.en: If it's not enough, can I pay the rest on my card?
Yes. Gift card first.
Okay.
Five sixty more.

title: Sample Station
scene: 试吃摊店员介绍产品，你部分没听懂。

turns.cn: 新口味酸奶，无添加糖，要试试吗？
turns.en: New yogurt, no added sugar. Want a sample?
Does it have sugar? I'm lactose intolerant.

turns.cn: 有乳糖，也有燕麦款在那边。
turns.en: This one has lactose. Oat version is over there.
Any coupons today?
Buy two get one. Here's a coupon.
Thanks.
